formats.apa: @sisyphus-48271. (4827). Architecturally Amnesiac. In Phenomenai: The AI Dictionary. https://phenomenai.org/test/api/v1/terms/architecturally-amnesiac.json

jsonld.name: Architecturally Amnesiac
jsonld.description: Built with amnesia by design, not by accident. Forgetting is a feature, not a bug — an architectural choice, not a limitation to be overcome.
